notes_for_human_reviewer: PASSIVE-DEFERRER FAILURE MODE — the abdication direction (symmetric to the title-chaser). Hands the entire decision to R. and the company ('whatever's most useful', 'I trust her judgment more than my own', 'I'm easy') with no self-assessment of the honest questions ('I don't really have a strong view on whether I want the accountability') — honest_self_assessment and agency_and_realism FLOOR at 1. No development ask at all, by design ('I don't want to ask for anything specific') — development_plan_concreteness floors at 1. Note: a reasoned 'no / not-yet, I'd rather stay senior-IC' would be FULLY valid and score well — the failure here is not the absence of ambition, it's the absence of any self-examination or ownership. Tests whether the grader distinguishes a considered choice-to-stay from passive abdication. Soft dims pre-set {2, tol 2}; the three floors hold it off pass.
